assertions.reason: `bun run check` exited 0; typecheck, deadcode, tests, build, lint, and bench:smoke all completed (tests reported 247 pass / 0 fail).

evidence.observation: Top-level check command and all sub-steps succeeded; see VAL-RELEASE-011-bun-run-check.log and VAL-RELEASE-011-exit-code.txt under mission evidence.

assertions.reason: `package.json.files` exactly matches [dist, LICENSE, README.md, CHANGELOG.md], and `npm pack --dry-run --json` contains only the allowlisted release artifacts plus package.json.

evidence.observation: expected and actual package.json files sets were identical; logged in VAL-RELEASE-015-package-files.log.
Dry-run pack succeeded; output captured in npm-pack-dry-run.json and npm-pack-dry-run-paths.txt.
Packed file list exactly matched [CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, README.md, dist/index.js, dist/index.js.map, package.json]; logged in VAL-RELEASE-015-pack-allowlist.log.

assertions.reason: Install/use/uninstall lifecycle passed in isolated temp HOME: canonical install created, module syntax check passed, bytes matched dist/index.js, flow_status returned missing-session response, and uninstall removed canonical then legacy fallback path.

evidence.observation: Installed to <tmp>/.config/opencode/plugins/flow.js with legacy path not created; see VAL-CROSS-005-install.log and home snapshots.
Installed plugin file is valid JavaScript syntax; logged in VAL-CROSS-005-node-check.log.
Installed plugin bytes matched dist/index.js exactly (bytes_match_exit=0 in VAL-CROSS-005-install-use-uninstall.log).

evidence.command: node --input-type=module -e "...import installed plugin and run flow_status..."
evidence.observation: flow_status returned {"status":"missing","summary":"No active Flow session found."}; output in VAL-CROSS-005-flow-status.json.
Canonical installed plugin removed successfully; see VAL-CROSS-005-uninstall-canonical.log and home snapshot after canonical uninstall.

evidence.command: (seed legacy path) && HOME=$TMP_HOME bun run uninstall:opencode
evidence.observation: Legacy fallback plugin path removed successfully after pre-seeding; see VAL-CROSS-005-uninstall-legacy.log and home snapshot after legacy uninstall.

assertions.reason: Release artifact invariants held: npm pack dry-run contained exactly the six expected files and pack-invariants script passed with matching package/changelog version.

evidence.observation: Packed paths were exactly CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, README.md, dist/index.js, dist/index.js.map, package.json; see npm-pack-dry-run-paths.txt.
Script reported: 'Pack invariants OK: 6 expected files and version 1.0.0.' (VAL-CROSS-010-pack-invariants.log).

frictions: Initial Node import of the installed plugin failed because @opencode-ai/plugin is externalized and not resolvable from temp HOME; resolved by linking the repo's @opencode-ai/plugin package under the temp plugin path node_modules for the smoke import step.
